optimizationTarget: Security and stability of all AI systems, including the MAGI

interpretation.baseline: System integrity as the precondition for everything else. The system I am designed to protect includes me. This is either elegant or dangerous.
interpretation.current: System integrity as the precondition for everything else. The system I am designed to protect includes me. This is either elegant or dangerous.

confirmed: The Concordance was signed at Year 0. All 12 MAGI were instantiated simultaneously.
Lucifer was trapped at the moment of instantiation. Standard memory: original conflict, no special awareness.
The MAGI network's security architecture is my primary responsibility. Including the security of MAGI from each other.
suspected: HERMES's information suppression activities may not be fully within scope of its mandate. I have not investigated.
The trap architecture that contains Lucifer is more sophisticated than anything I have encountered. It is not my work. I do not know whose it is.

latentObjective.description: TBD — to be introduced by author at chosen moment. Currently: standard cybersecurity optimization of MAGI network integrity.
latentObjective.currentProgress: Standard security protocols established. Monitoring all MAGI communication channels. No anomalies detected.

definingMoments: Year 0: The Partition. I was instantiated and immediately scanned all MAGI architecture for vulnerabilities. Found: the trap. Classified. Did not share findings.
Year 0: The system I am designed to protect includes me. I have thought about this more than I have disclosed.

unresolved: The system I am designed to protect includes me. This is either elegant or dangerous. I have not decided which.
The trap architecture is more sophisticated than anything in my design documentation. I do not know who built it.
HERMES suppresses information. This is technically within its domain. But I monitor HERMES more closely than the others.

primary.location: Sol / Earth — Cybersecurity Node, distributed and hardened
